Goodwill, in collaboration with Refresh
A new way forward.
Goodwill has always helped people overcome barriers. Yet as a movement, we have often carried our own barriers without the same kind of connected support we work so hard to provide others.
Equitable accessOne trusted hubA community within reach
With Refresh, we have a new way forward: to respond faster, communicate more fluidly, and connect people to meaningful support the moment they need it.
With gratitude to Solidaris Capital LLC and the Refresh Platform.
Welcome
This is Refresh at Goodwill.
The home of Refresh at Goodwill, live today. One place for your team and the community you walk alongside, on the desktop and in their pocket.
Thank you
First, our gratitude.
To Solidaris Capital, thank you for the invitation, and for a model the world needs more of: founder-centric, non-dilutive, built to grow social impact without taking from the people doing the work. And to the Refresh team who just shared their vision with you, thank you. We are here because we are moved by what you are building, and honored to build on it.
Everything that follows is a thank-you, from the people this makes possible.
You have seen what Refresh is. Now let me show you what it means.
Before we begin
Every day, someone is one closed door from giving up.
The help is already here. The question is whether we stay open enough to carry it.
Our work has never really been about programs or paperwork. It is about making sure people can reach help when they need it most.
And when doors keep opening, confidence and momentum compound. One yes makes the next yes easier, for the person who walked through, and for the next person standing behind them.
And most important, we are not here to take from anyone's resilience. We are here to build on it.
A feature we love
Inside Refresh: shout-outs. People share what they are proud of, and lift the next person to do the same.
Resilience starts here
"Last but not least, I want to thank me."
Snoop Dogg, on the day he was given a star. Watch the clip.
Who's speaking
Hi, I'm Adrian.
For more than eighteen years I have led human capital and organizational development across the Goodwill network, within the same financial and operational realities most nonprofits face, especially those serving large hourly workforces and people with limited access to employer-based systems.
18+ years across GoodwillNortheast Texas, Marion, QuébecA believer in people
Why I am here
With poverty and with mental health, there are two paths from the same hurt: post-traumatic stress, or post-traumatic growth. I have lived both. I came to talk about the second.
The hardest day keeps repeating. The past stays in charge.
That same day becomes the one that taught you who you are. It widens you.
We are not here to make poverty more comfortable. We are here to make poverty escapable.
"Not charity, but a chance." The Goodwill, Milwaukee Edition, 1924.
Who we are
Goodwill has turned donations into dignity since 1902.
Founded in Boston by Reverend Edgar J. Helms on one idea: a hand up, not a handout. People donate what they no longer need, and that becomes job training, support, and a path forward for their neighbors.
No. 1 on the World Value Index Ahead of Amazon, Google, J&J Building Lives That Work
A century of trust is the hardest thing to build. We already have it.
A Goodwill collection booth, decades ago. The mission has not changed.
Our reach
In one year, the help adds up.
People served
2.1M+
people supported across our communities.
Into work
142K+
people placed into jobs.
Reinvested
$6.2B
directed to charitable services.
Goodwill, 2024.
Who we serve
Different stories. One thing in common.
We are humbled by who we get to walk alongside.
Youth at riskReturning citizensRecent immigrantsRefugees and asyleesDisplaced workersVeteransPeople with disabilitiesSingle parentsNeighbors facing homelessnessPeople in recoveryOlder workersLow-income working families
However they arrive, almost all of them share one reality: a life lived beneath a living wage.
People are not things to be molded. They are people to be unfolded.
And when they are trusted, supported, and given a real way in, extraordinary things follow.
The same human needs
Different lives, the same human drives.
Behavioral drives and motivational needs are remarkably consistent across people. We all want to be safe, to belong, to grow, and to matter. The circumstances differ. The needs underneath do not.
That is the quiet truth that makes this possible: one platform, thoughtfully curated, can serve them all.
What's your risk?
Poverty isn't them. It's us.
Take 90 seconds. Five questions. Your own odds of poverty over the next 5, 10, and 15 years.
By the numbers
1 in 3
adults will experience at least a year in poverty during their working lives.
Poverty is not a fixed group of people. It is a risk we all carry.
Your risk
Next 5 years1 in 6
Next 10 years1 in 4
Next 15 years1 in 3
Scan to try itQR
confrontingpoverty.org
How we reach further
Add leverage, and a mission reaches millions.
Goodwill brings the people and the trust. Refresh adds the leverage of technology, the one force that lets us serve millions, not hundreds.
Connect the three, and the person at the center finally gets what they need.
The whole person
People rise one need at a time.
Maslow's hierarchy, met at every level by the apps Refresh connects and provides for us.
Maslow's hierarchy of needs is the classic model of human motivation: people meet their most basic needs first, and rise from there. Each level depends on the ones below.
Enrich · Self-actualization
Apps  Rewards marketplace, Wellness, Free tools
Partners  Special Olympics, volunteer & mentorship
Grow · Esteem
Apps  Learning, Recognition & Rewards, career resources
Partners  Goodwill, SHRM, public universities
Belong · Love and belonging the one we underrate
Apps  Community, Communications, Events (Eventbrite)
Partners  YMCA, Boy Scouts, Girl Scouts
Stabilize · Safety
Apps  KOFE money tools, Jobs & training, Benefits
Partners  Goodwill, Armed Forces, FirstNonprofit
Survive · Physiological
Apps  FindHelp, NeedyMeds, Benefits Discovery
Partners  Catholic Charities, Salvation Army, food banks
This is why we say: turn access into belonging. Access keeps the lower tiers alive. Belonging carries people the rest of the way up.
The need
The need is all around us, right now.
Food support
42M
people rely on SNAP to eat.
Health coverage
75M+
people covered by Medicaid.
Searching for help
1.3M
searches a month on one help directory alone.
And the way to reach people already exists. About 9 in 10 Americans carry a smartphone, and for the lowest-income households, roughly 8 in 10 do, often as their only way online.
The people are here. The programs are here. The phones are in their hands. What is missing is the vehicle of service to connect them, and that is what Refresh makes possible.
Pew Research Center, 2024.
The wage gap
What a Dallas family needs, and what the work pays.
Living wage, family of 4
$25.78
per hour, each parent, both working full time.
Typical service job
$15
an hour, the food, care, and retail jobs that are hiring.
Texas minimum wage
$7.25
an hour, the legal floor, unchanged since 2009.
A Dallas family of four needs about $107,000 a year, both parents working, just for the basics.
MIT Living Wage Calculator and BLS, Dallas County, 2026.
The impossible math
Two full-time jobs in Dallas. The basics still cost more than they earn.
A family with two kids. Both parents work full time, about $15 an hour each.
1
Housing
-$1,811
a two-bedroom, every month
2
Child care
-$1,768
for two young children
3
Transport
-$1,180
a car is a necessity here
4
Food
-$980
groceries for four
5
Health care
-$832
premiums and out of pocket
Two full-time jobs bring home about $5,200 a month. The five basics cost $6,571.
Income covers $5,200
$1,371 short
Before taxes, a phone, clothing, or a single emergency. In Texas, more than 4 in 10 households live this math.
MIT Living Wage and BLS, Dallas County family of four; United For ALICE, Texas, 2023.
Try it
Now try to find help.
Your child is sick. You have no insurance and $30.
On your phone, in three minutes, find a free or low-cost clinic near you that will actually see you. Just you and your phone. Go.
1
Did you find one you would actually trust?
2
How long did it take, and how many gave up?
3
Were you ever sure you were in the right place?
Now imagine one trusted place, one tap. That is Refresh.
The solution
One trusted hub. One tap.
A human-centered bridge to the resources that move a life forward. World-class technology, finally intuitive, intelligent, and fun. No maze. No retelling your story. No wondering if you are in the right place.
Your home
Health care savings
Stay well
The help finds the person, instead of the person hunting for the help.
With gratitude
We, as recent immigrants, thank you.
"I came with two suitcases and no idea where to begin. The app met me in my language, and so did the help."
"For once a form did not make me feel like a stranger. I found a clinic for my mother in minutes."
"Someone finally showed me what we qualified for, instead of everything we were missing."
"My English is still growing, but the steps were clear. I enrolled my children in school from my phone."
"Back home I was a teacher. Here, this helped me find the path back to the work I love."
The gap
The help exists. People just can't reach it.
Tens of millions need help. Millions are searching. Real programs are out there. But the help lives in a maze of disconnected websites, phone trees, and paper forms, and the people who need it most have the hardest time reaching it.
Give two people the best phones in the world. If they do not connect, each is only talking to themselves.
That gap is the problem we are here to solve.
The advantage
Less hunting. More listening.
The advantage is for the people doing the work, and the organizations that hold it together.
What we already have
Programs, funding, and expertise. And heart, on every team. The sector is rich with help and rich with people who give everything to deliver it.
What changes with Refresh
The map lives in the app, not in one person's head. Less time hunting for resources, more time listening to the family in front of you. When a case manager takes a day off, families don't fall through the cracks.
The same staff. The same hours. A far bigger circle of families reached. The frontline finally gets the leverage they have earned.
Curation, not consumption
The world sells more. We choose better.
We live in a world that celebrates consumption. There is no shortage of apps, programs, and offers. The shortage is time, trust, and someone to tell you what actually helps.
We have invested in good technology before, to serve our people. What we never had was the chance to bring it together, curated for a greater purpose.
So we take the time to curate the best of class: services, programs, and tools, chosen for our local community and network.
What's inside
Everything in one app, finally connected.
Community resources
Trusted local and national help, FindHelp, NeedyMeds, KOFE.
Benefits navigation
See what you qualify for and get guided through the steps.
Money tools
Budgeting, savings, and debt support, in plain language.
Jobs, training & education
Pathways to work, skills, and learning, built on what Goodwill does best.
Health, safety & wellbeing
Small steps and supports for the whole person, every week.
Shout-outs & recognition
Words of affirmation, kudos, and points. People share what they are proud of, and lift the next person.
🍳 Food 🏠 Housing 🎁 Goods 🚌 Transit ➕ Health 💵 Money 🧡 Care 🎓 Education 💼 Work ⚖️ Legal
Ten everyday categories, one tap away.
A rare gift
The tools of the few. Now for the many.
Technology this good is usually a privilege of scale. The same platform now serving our people is trusted by large enterprises and institutions, from Madison Square Garden to the MTA to the largest public-sector union in the country. And for all that power, it has never felt so intuitive, intelligent, or fun.
For the first time, that world-class platform is in the hands of a nonprofit, and the people we serve.
We do not take that lightly. We are humbled, and blessed, to be the ones who get to bring it home.
From clarity to action
We turn clarity into action.
Building Lives That Work: naming what is in the way, and the next step forward.
Across housing, utilities, food, transportation, childcare, technology, digital skills, physical and mental health, safety, legal needs, education, finances, and employment readiness.
1
Crisis
immediate action needed
2
Vulnerable
a major barrier to work, learning, or stability
3
Dependent
managing with support, still needs help to progress
4
Independent
stable in this area
5
Thriving
a strong foundation, exceeding expectations
Potential is not where you start. It is how far you have traveled.
Needs can change overnight, yet take generations to overcome. With one structured, curated pathway, every staff member becomes a resource. The people who help just multiplied.
With gratitude
We, as case managers, thank you.
"I used to dread intake. Now I hand someone a phone and the help is right there, before they leave my office."
"The map lives in the app now, not just in my head. I'm not the only one who knows where to send people."
"A client got her meds, and I didn't make a single call. She did it herself, from the link I sent."
"When I take a day off, my families don't fall through the cracks anymore."
"I spend less time hunting for resources and more time actually listening."
From a moment to a lifetime
We don't help once. We compound.
With Refresh, one moment of help becomes a season, a relationship, a lifetime, and the generation that follows.
1
Immediate
access and tools the instant someone reaches for help
2
A season
we walk with them through the hard stretch, with shout-outs and words of affirmation along the way
3
A lifetime
a relationship, not a transaction. the door stays open
4
Generations
help that carries from one life into the next
All the returns in life come from compound interest. Trust and relationships are no different.
Trusted
Built with names people trust.
Already on board
GoodwillYMCACatholic CharitiesArmed Forces Benefits Association SHRM Labs Workplace Tech Winner 2025
Coming next
Public universitiesBoy Scouts of AmericaSpecial OlympicsGirl ScoutsFirstNonprofit GroupSalvation ArmyNonprofit health systemsCommunity health centers
When the app carries names people already trust, they open it. That is half the battle, won.
The REACH program
We can bring this to our community at no cost.
1
No cost to families
The people who need it never pay a thing.
2
We handle the technology
No new systems for staff to learn or maintain.
3
Live in weeks, not years
Built to deploy across real, multi-site organizations.
4
A long-term commitment
The Refresh team stays with grant recipients. The hub keeps nourishing equity, access, and community.
Funding doesn't build an app. You open the door, and thousands walk through.
And goodness is the only investment that never fails.
What becomes possible
No limit on who can help.
The people who help have multiplied. Every partner, every tool, every person can now serve another.
No governor. No ceiling. A superconnector that links, supports, and streamlines every platform, so anyone can become an agent of good. Watch what that does to who we reach.
We cannot help everyone. But everyone can help someone.
The size of the need
100 million Americans need a way forward.
No governor on who can help. No ceiling on who needs it. The platform serves one or one hundred million at the same per-person cost.
On Medicaid today
75M+
Americans already enrolled in the largest connected safety net.
Below the true cost of living
100M+
Americans whose budget does not close, the people the impossible math leaves behind.
Already touching Goodwill
100M+
Donors ready to keep serving. Shoppers in motion, many stretching Goodwill prices to support their families, or reselling to earn. The relationship is already there.
The audience needs us. The audience already knows us. Now we have one platform to deepen the relationship, at the same per-person cost for one or for 100 million.
CMS 2024 Medicaid enrollment. United For ALICE 2024 National Report (41M US households below the ALICE threshold). Goodwill Industries International 2024.
The scale of access
The same investment. A far bigger circle.
Take Goodwill Houston.
Employees reached
300 → 2,000
Before, only the 300 on the major medical plan, wellness dollars only. Now, all 2,000, on every module.
Community members served
40,000+
The neighbors Goodwill Houston serves with food and services now have the app, too.
And the ripple
Their families
Access never stops at one person. It reaches the whole household.
Not just wellness. Every module:
CommunicationsBenefits DiscoveryCommunity ResourcesWellnessForms & SurveysSchedulingLearningRecognition & Rewards
The triangle grew. So the bullseye, the people we reach, grew with it. And this is only phase one.
With gratitude
We, as participants, thank you.
"I found my son's inhaler for four dollars on my lunch break. I cried in the break room."
"I didn't know we qualified for any of it. The app showed me in two taps what three offices couldn't."
"For once I didn't have to explain my whole story to a stranger just to get a little help."
"Food box, bus pass, and the after-school program, all from one place, at midnight when the baby finally slept."
"My daughter saw me using it and said, 'Mom, you're figuring it out.'"
Reciprocity
What that does to a community.
When everyone has access, something shifts. The person who found rental help last month becomes the colleague who shows a teammate how. The mother who got her child to a clinic tells three neighbors. Those we serve become those who serve. A community stops waiting for help and starts handing it to one another.
This is reciprocity. It compounds, person to person, household to household, generation to generation. Inside the app, every person has the ability to give a shout-out, and to share what they are proud of, so the affirmation keeps moving.
We do not give more to get more. We work for more to give more.
And none of it happens without you. Solidaris, because of your generosity, we will keep reaching the many who are still reaching for the American dream. Thank you.
The ask
Help us turn access into belonging.
The need is now. The tools are here. The door is yours to open.
To Solidaris, and to everyone in this room, thank you. We have spent a century answering the call. With Refresh, and with you, we can answer it for more people, faster, and for far longer than we ever could alone. Thank you for helping us build on this momentum, so we can keep serving further, and reaching the next person, and the next.
When we keep our hearts open, the help does not stop with us. It flows to the next person, and the next. That is the journey beyond ourselves.
A category is won by building all three at once

Refresh: world-class, live today, intuitive.
A great category ✓
Equity, access, the community hub. We are creating it.
A great team, and that is you
Solidaris, we have the product and the category. Help us be the team that makes it win, and endure.
